name: Dealership Display Name
logo_url: OPTIONAL — a direct URL to the dealer's logo (svg/png). If set, --gen downloads it. Otherwise drop the file at the 'logo' path yourself.
_logo_chip_note: Use "" for a dark/colour logo (sits on a cream chip). Use "ink" for a white/light logo (sits on a dark chip).
showroom_prompt: A premium <brand>-style automotive dealership showroom exterior, expansive glass frontage, polished forecourt with clean prestige cars, soft overcast light, wet reflective paving, upmarket architecture, photoreal, muted palette of deep teal/amber/ink, no people, NO TEXT, NO LOGOS, NO BADGES, NO CAPTIONS.
showroom_motion_prompt: Continue this exact scene in motion. Keep the building and cars identical to the photo. Very slow, smooth cinematic camera push-in, soft reflections, calm premium mood. NO TEXT, NO CAPTIONS, NO new logos.
